title: Additional Shards
description: A mod that adds new shards (based on the echo shard) with potion effects.
body:
This is a mod that adds 6 new consumable shards to your game. These shards will give the user potion effects, and can be crafted using echo shards.
Although it is a simple mod, it adds a new use for echo shards. In regular Minecraft, you only need echo shards to make a Recovery Compass, which is mostly (if not complete) useless with many mods. Now, you will be able to use these shards to make new items that might be good for your Minecraft world (specially the haste shard).
This mod includes names for US English and Brazilian Portuguese, and is available for forge 1.19.2, with the (small) possibility for forge 1.20 and/or fabric (1.19.2 and/or 1.20).

Note: This mod needs to be installed both in the Minecraft Client and in the Minecraft Server
